name: One Stop Pawn
description_short: Modern pawn shop in Los Angeles specializing in jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, cameras, bicycles, and power tools. Offers buying, selling, consignment, and collateral-based loans.
description_long:
One Stop Pawn operates as a brick-and-mortar pawn shop located at 2304 S La Cienega Blvd in Los Angeles, CA, near the intersection with Cadillac Ave. The business positions itself as a "modern, clean pawn shop" offering fast cash transactions to consumers in the Los Angeles area. Based on their Yahoo Local listing, they have established a 4.0-star rating across 61 reviews, suggesting consistent customer satisfaction despite some service variability.

One Stop Pawn's core services include buying, selling, and consigning merchandise, as well as providing collateral-based loans against items of value. The company specializes in high-value categories: jewelry, electronics, musical instruments and gear, cameras, bicycles, and power tools. Their "CASH IN A FLASH" tagline emphasizes quick transaction processing for consumers needing immediate funds. The business operates Monday through Saturday (10:00 AM - 5:30 PM) and is closed Sundays. They offer parking accessible via an alley entrance off Cadillac Ave.

The business distinguishes itself through customer service emphasis and fair pricing practices. Multiple positive reviews specifically praise staff member Steven for honesty, gentlemanship, and fair loan valuations. One customer noted the shop was "highly recommended," and another specifically compared their experience favorably to other Los Angeles pawn shops. The business actively encourages customer feedback and maintains an online presence through their website (onestoppawnla.com) and phone contact (310-204-4653).

However, the profile is not without concerns. Among 61 reviews, 13 gave one-star ratings, indicating meaningful service inconsistency. One recent complaint (02/25/25) described staff as "rude" and noted a disappointing experience compared to another pawn shop location. Reviews suggest service quality may depend heavily on which staff member handles the transaction, particularly relying on positive mentions of "Steven" or "Steve." As a pawn shop, this business operates in a high-interest lending category and involves surrendering collateral, which carries inherent financial risk for borrowers.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 4.0-star rating across 61 reviews on Yahoo Local, with 48 five-star reviews
Staff member Steven specifically praised for honesty, fair valuations, and exceptional customer service in multiple reviews
Accepts wide range of high-value items: jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, cameras, bicycles, and power tools
Convenient parking available behind store with alley access off Cadillac Ave
Extended weekday and weekend hours (10 AM-5:30 PM Mon-Sat)
Quick transaction processing emphasized ("CASH IN A FLASH")
Offers multiple transaction types: buying, selling, consignment, and collateral loans
cons: 13 one-star reviews out of 61 indicate significant service inconsistency, with recent complaint (02/25/25) describing staff as rude
Service quality appears dependent on individual staff member handling transaction, creating unpredictable customer experience
As a pawn shop, requires customers to surrender collateral, creating financial risk and repayment obligations with interest
Limited hours (closed Sundays, weekday closing at 5:30 PM) may be inconvenient for working customers
Closed on Sundays, reducing accessibility for weekend shoppers
best_for: Los Angeles-area consumers with jewelry, electronics, or musical instruments needing same-day cash
People looking to sell or consign bicycles, power tools, or cameras in the Los Angeles area
Borrowers seeking collateral-based loans as an alternative to traditional lending
diagnosis: One Stop Pawn is best suited for Los Angeles consumers who own jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, cameras, bicycles, or tools and need quick cash via collateral-based lending or sales. The main caveat is service inconsistency—while positively reviewed staff exist, recent complaints indicate unreliable service quality, and customers should be prepared to forfeit collateral if unable to repay loans.
services: Collateral-based pawn loans on jewelry, electronics, and other valuables
Buying used electronics (computers, phones, gaming systems, etc.)
Buying and selling musical instruments and audio gear
Buying and selling cameras and photography equipment
Consignment services for various merchandise categories
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 2304 S La Cienega Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90034
